results.title: ‘I’ll Be Taken To Tihar Jail The Moment I Land In Delhi’: Cockroach Janta Party Founder Abhijeet Dipke
results.description: Cockroach Janta Party founder Abhijeet Dipke says he fears arrest in Delhi as the satirical party gains Gen Z support.

results.title: Singing of 'Vande Mataram' compulsory in all schools, madrasas in Bengal: Dilip Ghosh
results.description: West Bengal mandates 'Vande Mataram' singing in all schools and madrasas, sparking resistance from some minority groups.

results.title: British mother's horror as she finds man, 33, 'kissing and hugging' her four-year-old son in Magaluf hotel pool
results.description: The Romanian 33-year-old was detained after allegedly going up to the youngster and hugging and kissing him on the face in front of stunned holidaymakers.
